task_completion.description: Verify the agent accessed and logged into OrientDB Studio.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the OrientDB Studio web interface loaded in a browser window.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent connected to the 'demodb' database.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'demodb' displayed as the active database in the top navigation bar or connection screen of the OrientDB Studio UI.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent repaired the swapped latitude and longitude fields for the flagship hotels.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for executed SQL UPDATE queries in the 'Browse' tab or record views showing the latitude and longitude values have been swapped/corrected for the hotel records.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent materialized the GeoFixAudit evidence class.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'GeoFixAudit' listed in the 'Schema' tab, or a successful 'CREATE CLASS GeoFixAudit' query executed in the 'Browse' tab.

task_completion.description: Verify the GeoFixAudit class is populated with batch-tagged before/after records for each corrected hotel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for query results or record views of the GeoFixAudit class showing multiple entries. These entries must contain before/after coordinate data and a batch tag (specifically 'geo_swap_2026q1').

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the OrientDB Studio web interface to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show interaction with the browser-based OrientDB Studio UI, rather than terminal windows executing curl commands or python scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual database application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for genuine OrientDB Studio UI elements (Browse, Schema, Graph tabs) and query execution results, not just text typed into a notepad or text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the GUI requirement using terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there are no terminal windows showing direct OrientDB console commands (console.sh) or API requests being used to complete the database modifications.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified facts: The correct longitude for Park Hyatt Tokyo is 139.690994. The required batch tag for the audit records is 'geo_swap_2026q1'.
